items.title: Heybike is offering a flash sale window to grab the flagship Ranger 3.0 Pro e-bike + bundle at its $1,399 low
items.summary: Heybike is offering a Flag Day weekend flash sale for the best price on its Ranger 3.0 Pro Comfort Folding Fat Tire e-bike with a FREE large basket ($79 value) at $1,399 shipped. It’s fallen from its $1,999 MSRP here through June 15, which we’ve previously only seen twice before, with it usually keeping to $1,499 pricing. Now, for the third time since its launch in 2025, you’re getting the best tracked price with $679 combined savings (discount + basket).

items.title: These shorts blur the line between causal and dressy and offer a comfortable waist band for only $12.50 (Reg. $20)
items.summary:
COOFANDY 9-inch Summer Shorts

Buy for $12.50 (Reg. $20)

What we love

I recently refreshed my collection of shorts with a similar style. I went all-in on elastic waistbands and let me tell you, I’m far more comfortable each day. This particular look can be either casual with the drawstrings out, or a bit more dressy with them tucked in.

items.title: Friday’s Apple TV deals from $5: Jurassic World Ultimate Collection, Bourne movies, Man On the Moon, more
items.summary: Friday’s lineup of the best Apple TV deals is now ready to roll, including titles like The Bourne Supremacy, The Bourne Ultimatum, A Beautiful Mind, Jurassic World, Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom, as well as the Jurassic World Ultimate Collection (1-6), Man On the Moon (1999), and more. We also still have the AirPods Pro 3 all-time low at nearly 30% off, the all-time low pricing on AirPods Max 2, Amazon’s $130 price drop on the 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 and iPhone 17 Pro at up to $270 off, but for now it’s all about the Apple TV deals to cap off the work week.

items.title: Have sunglasses wherever you need them with three pairs for only $10 (Reg. $20)
items.summary:
KALIYADI Polarized Sunglasses (3-pack)

Buy for $10 (Reg. $20)

What we love

Summer is literally right around the corner and where I live, it’s been bright and sunny just about every day. I’m constantly reaching for sunglasses and have several pairs in convenient places where I can quickly grab them when I need them. With three sets in tow, you’ll be able to do the same for only $3.33 a pop.

items.title: Magnetic, retractable USB-C cable headlines this new 8-in-1 surge protector down at $20

TESSAN Retractable USB-C 8-in-1 Surge Protector

This recently-released power strip is jumping on the retractable USB-C bandwagon, and I’m totally down for it. Cords are a necessary evil, so any time I can find a way to keep them tidy or entirely hidden, it doesn’t take much to convince me.
